navbar.reorderModeHint: Reorder mode is active, move your widgets

bookmarkPopover.permissionDescription: To show your browser bookmarks in this section, we need your permission.

extensionInstalled.keepItAlt: How to keep the extension enabled
extensionInstalled.keepItHint: ⚠️ To activate the extension, click the "Keep It" button.

firefox.title: Privacy notice
firefox.description: Please choose which data you want to share:

points.localSettings: Local settings: all your preferences are stored only on your device.
points.icons: Website icons: the domain is used to fetch favicons from a Google service (requires analytics consent).
points.sync: Sync & calendar: only enabled if you sign in.

firefox.allowAnalytics: Send anonymous technical analytics (to improve the extension)

footer.title: Declutter your browser
footer.descriptionAfter: on it and choose the option below:
footer.imageAlt: How to hide the browser footer bar

steps.settingsButton: Use this button to open extension settings and widget management, then customize them.
steps.profileAndFriends: Use this area to access and manage your profile and friends list.
steps.bookmarks: This section lets you manage bookmarks: add new ones, edit or delete existing ones, and change each bookmark's settings.
steps.widgets: This is the main widgets area. You can use widgets without limits, but to avoid clutter we suggest keeping at most 4 widgets active at the same time.

showTimeZone.title: Show time zone
showTimeZone.description: Display time zone name under the clock

useSelectedFont.title: Use selected font
useSelectedFont.description: Use the selected extension font for clock display

searchAndBookmarks.title: Search & Bookmarks
searchAndBookmarks.positionLabel: Search bar position (when list is hidden)

city.title: City
city.errorHint: Check your internet connection and try again
city.footerQuestion: Your city isn’t listed or you see a problem?

platforms.intro: Connect external platforms to TabFrix to enable related features. You can disconnect anytime.
platforms.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect from {{name}}?
platforms.disconnectWarning: ⚠️ Disconnecting will remove access to data and features for this platform.

google.name: Google Calendar
google.description: Connect your Google account to access your calendar and Google Meet meetings.
features: Smart display and reminders for upcoming events and meetings

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Connect to GitHub to view repositories, commits, and project activity.

analytics.title: Extension usage analytics
analytics.description: When enabled, anonymous usage statistics are collected to help improve the extension. No personal information is sent.

bookmarks.title: Access to browser bookmarks
bookmarks.description: When enabled, the extension only accesses your browser bookmarks to display them inside TabFrix. Nothing is stored or transmitted; bookmarks are shown only in the extension.

tabs.title: Access to tabs
tabs.description: When enabled, the extension can open and manage bookmarks inside folders in bulk. No personal information is stored or transmitted.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: TabFrix shortcuts for faster, more comfortable use.

items.open_bookmark_new_tab: Open a bookmark in a new tab
items.open_bookmark_middle_click: Open a bookmark in a new tab with the middle mouse button
items.open_all_bookmarks: Open all bookmarks in a folder

wallpapers.uploadPrompt: Click to upload from your device

coin.unlockHint: Unlock this wallpaper with Widget Coins and keep it forever!
coin.earnHint: Earn Widget Coins by completing activities and inviting friends.

ui.title: User interface
ui.intro: Customize how the extension looks to match your needs.

advanced.label: Default
advanced.description: Everything in view: tools, widgets, and full freedom to arrange your layout.

simple.label: Simple & calm
simple.description: Minimal, fast, and easy on the eyes—when focus matters.

font.title: Extension font
font.intro: Choose the font used across the extension:
font.defaultFontDesc: A friendly font for everyday reading.

browserTitle.title: Browser title
browserTitle.intro: Change the tab title so you can find it easier whenever you’re on this tab.

alignment.title: Layout
alignment.centerDesc: Content is placed in the middle of the page.
alignment.topDesc: Content is placed toward the top of the page.

about.description: <brand /> is an open-source browser extension that turns your new tab into a productive, personalized space with useful tools and a polished look.

dropdown.simpleUiWarning: In simple UI mode, widgets cannot be changed or moved!

releaseNotes.subtitle: New update for TabFrix
releaseNotes.newUiDescriptionPart2: to TabFrix! The previous interface is still there; now you can switch between two different styles and choose the one that works best for you.

features.1: Update Logic to API less structure
